positive: A mystical, stylized portrait of a majestic wolf howling at a full moon, surrounded by glowing bioluminescent flora and crystal shards. The wolf should be rendered in a dramatic, elegant silhouette against a gradient of deep indigo, midnight blue, and ethereal lavender. Emphasize strong contrasts and clean lines for optimal apparel printing. Include subtle abstract cosmic dust scattering around the edges. Composition should be centered and balanced, drawing the eye to the wolf's form. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Vaporwave fantasy. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the silhouette. Print-friendly details: Vector graphic quality, high saturation, clean edges, scalable.
negative: low detail, blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poorly rendered, messy, gradient bleed, muted colors
